title: Random Decorative Things
body:
This mod is here to add decorative blocks (maybe items in the future) to the world of Minecraft.

This mod is still in an early stage, I wanted to release a version because people liked some of the stuff that I made for it.
If you got any suggestions for blocks I can add be sure to leave it in the comments or in the issues tab with the tag "Suggestion"

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
